text: AWS Certificate Manager (ACIV) @ hupsuneamcantitia (©) aoriancanu * ACM can generate or import Certificates ¢ If generated ... it can automatically renew e If imported .. you are responsible for renewal * Certificates can be deployed out to supported services * Supported AWS Services ONLY (e.g. CloudFront and ALBs..NOT EC2)
